programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Kimchi Lava. Hungry Tish finds an interesting looking pot of kimchi in the fridge and digs in - something she quickly regrets when she realises how spicy it is!
Ice Lolly. Children's animation. Bing and Flop buy an ice lolly from Gilly. Before they can eat their lollies, a frog hops into Bing's paddling pool, and they go to the rescue.
Sleepybyes. Preschool series. It is sleepybyes time, so the Teletubbies say goodnight to the Tiddlytubbies. But Po isn't tired and goes for a special ride on her scooter.
Carpet. Tee accidently marks Mo's newly cleaned carpet. Uh-oh!
Hiccup Havoc. Supertato harnesses the power of his hiccups to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's jam attack.
Birthday. It's Bing's third birthday, but there's trouble when he teaches his friends the waka-oke.
Ludwig the Lady. Jackson's big, blue chicken-thing, Ludwig, is going to lay an egg. And it's up to Mojo and Bo to carry the big bird across dangerous roads to Preston's egg-hatching shed!
Ladybird's Game Show. Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.
The Crazy Golf Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels practise their golf in pursuit of a round of milkshakes.
Faceytalk. Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with their cousins, but Muffin won't give Socks a turn.
Bad Mood. Bingo is stomping around the house with Dad causing chaos, but can Bluey get her to stop?
Mariana Trench, the Pacific Ocean. Lars dives deep to save a Grimbot in the Mariana Trench, the deepest trench in our oceans.
The Tale of the Heroic Hedgehog. Animated series. Peter escapes a very chatty Mrs Tiggy-Winkle to go strawberry-raiding, but soon gets into trouble.
Ringed Seals. Arctic ringed seals are threatened when warming temperatures diminish their snow caves.
The Mystery of Fraction Island. The Numberblocks are exploring Fraction Island. Why are there four islands when their map shows one? Will the Fraction Friends help them solve the mystery?
Space. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. S, P, A, C and E wonder what is up past the sky, and soon find out.
Accidental Elder Day. Mistakenly believing that he has become an elder, Love Monster gets a job.
Gloves. Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.
Garlic. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's fitness guru Garlic with a set of fun exercises to make you stronger!
Mobile Phone. Children's animation. Bing is playing the talking lettuce game on Flop's phone when he drops the phone and accidentally breaks it.
Tractor. Dee encourages a friend to say 'tractor', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There's a big tractor, a stuck-in-the-mud tractor and even a trumpeting tractor!
Bug Hugs. Barnaby is in the mood for hugs, but not all his friends are.
Bed Bother. The Piggies make Rebecca a new bed, but Wilf falls asleep on it.
More About Faster and Faster. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos find a machine that shoots tennis balls and discover how to make the balls come out faster and faster.
Flying Fun. Justin and his friends meet some very cool, feathered friends and learn to fly them. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble is taking a trip on an aeroplane... but who is the pilot?
Loop the Loop. Preschool series. In Tummy Tales, a group of children watch a plane loop the loop in the air, whilst the Teletubbies have fun watching a shooting star loop the loop.
Ribbons. Nigel and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore ribbons through discovery, play, song and story. Babies and grown-ups at home can join in, too!
Wind Farm Beach. Elsee plays I-spy whilst on a beach walk with Mohamoud.
Trees. Adrian, Mia and Aaron go on a 'tree-mendous' garden adventure to discover the magical powers of trees.
Hotel Manager. Dylan the manager wants to help a guest enjoy their stay at his hotel, but he soon discovers that giving them a good night's sleep can be pretty exhausting!
Moon Baby. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. In this soft lullaby, Moon Baby observes the galaxy from up on the moon before floating back home to his cosy nursery.
Wasabi's Big Day Off. When Wasabi injures his leg, Ginger and the Peas are forced to wait on him hand and foot.
Shaun. Dad transforms his hand into their old friend Shaun, a chaotic, undisciplined Emu.
The Mixtape Badge. The Squirrels make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of their happy memories together.
The Singing Caterpillar. The Game Catchers land on the Salad Planet to play hurdles relay.
Ballerina Timmy. Timmy is enthralled by Mittens's new music box, which has a splendid ballerina on top. But he and Yabba manage to break her precious toy.
Ted's Amazing Meatballs! Ted and his Dad team up to make marvellous meatballs for the family's dinner. Squidgy meat and bendy spaghetti - it's the slurpiest meal you've ever seen!
Hannah's Korean Salmon. Hannah is making a delicious marinade for salmon with soy sauce and Korean chilli paste.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Seahorses. Chantelle goes underwater, and Rory and Sandy go to an aquarium to see seahorses.
Mission: Happy Memories. Therapy dog Toffee and his owner Helen are visiting a lady called Anita, who lives on her own, to keep her company and to listen to all her amazing stories.
Tenrec and Tarantula. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's the tenrec and a tarantula called Kate.
Waffle Tries to Be Still. Waffle ends up in Evie's class, where he must be still so the headteacher doesn't see him.
Hop, Skip and Bump. Oona really wants to learn how to jump like the experts.
Snowbiz. It's been snowing, and Yukee and her garden friends use music and beat to build a big snow band.   Followed by My Petsaurus.
The Grandparents Badge. Animated preschool series. It's Bring Your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. But these grandparents seem more of a lively bunch than Duggee was expecting.
Worm. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'worm', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, looking at lots of different kinds of worms.
Grid Games Galore. It's time for Six's board game club, but will she be able to tell her two guests apart? For grid games galore, call Fifty-four. In a colourful fix, call Fifty-six!
The End. Educational fun. OI, OR and UR  are in a coin-rolling, cork-popping, wave-surfing mad dash to prove who is the fastest!
New Shoes. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Today, Justin goes shoe shopping. Mr Tumble visits Shopkeeper Tumble at The Shop with the Lot for pair of new red boots!
Knock Knock. Preschool series. Tinky Winky knocks on a door and is welcomed by Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po. The children in Tummy Tales knock on their neighbours' doors.
Patchwork Butterfly. Patchwork Butterfly has a problem: he doesn't like his trunk! Will the Patchwork Pals find a way to show him how pretty and useful a trunk like his is?
Raa Raa and the Jungle Fixers. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa's friends help him to fix lots of broken things around the Jingly Jangly Jungle.
Spy Train. The Trainees are on a mission to play top-secret spy games in Chuggington but their sleuthing missions turn into wild shenanigans!
Episode 10. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. The future looks rocky for some valuable antique vases when Ann Teak attempts to play the lute.
Food Machines. Series for young children that celebrates lots of different amazing machines. In this episode, motorcycle rider Grace shows off three amazing food machines.
The Ball Machine. The Game Catchers land on a planet made of coloured building blocks and learn to play the ball race. Before they begin, they need to fix the special ball dispenser machine.
Sea Pigs. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts must stop a huge herd of sea pigs before they march blindly into the Mariana Trench.
The Tale of the Lost Tunnels. Animated series. When Benjamin gets lost in a network of underground tunnels, Peter and Lily set out to find him.
The Organising Badge. Animated preschool series. The Squirrels decide it is time to tidy up. Luckily, Duggee has his organising badge and reorganises everything in the clubhouse.
Koa's Sweet Tooth. When Koa the tiger's teeth hurt, Vida discovers bacteria in his mouth from all the sweets he has been eating.
Fortune Cookies. Evil Pea tricks Supertato and Broccoli with fake fortune cookies that tell them to leave the supermarket. Thankfully, Carrot doesn't believe them and saves the day.
Mission Mini. It's mini mayhem when the Ducklings find a device that can shrink things.
Clock Tower Heist. The clock tower is missing a hand. Detectives Mojo and Bo are on the case!
Faceytalk. Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with their cousins, but Muffin won't give Socks a turn.
Muffin Cone. Muffin's cone gets in the way of her playing a game of sandwich shop with Bluey and Bingo.
Pancake's Big Beak Freakout. Pancake is worried about getting his beak buffed, so his Piri friends try to help.
Andy and the Coati. Andy heads to the Amazon rainforest in search of a coati. Along the way, he meets a family of South American river otters, a jaguar and a savanna hawk.
Waffle Needs Quiet Time. Waffle learns that reading can be just as much fun as noisy maze games.
The Basketball Wish. Rafi's magic basketball makes every basket, but she discovers that real victory is earned, and scoring only feels special when you've worked for it.
It's Time to Make a New Game. JoJo and Raya play snakes and ladders, but think it would be fun to make a new game.
Alarm Cluck. Animation for preschool children. Duck keeps oversleeping, so Sarah decides he needs his own alarm clock.
The Chicken Waltz. Stop-motion animation. When the Iron Chicken finds Tiny's new tune too difficult to dance to, Tiny and Small come up with another rhythm just for her.
Dance. BaBa struggles to follow the steps in MeMo's dance routine, but this doesn't mean BaBa can't dance. With the help of friends, BaBa discovers there are many ways to dance.
Jumping for Everybody. Series for young children set in a magical forest. The Pontipines count to six. Upsy Daisy shows Igglepiggle how to jump up and down, and everyone joins in.
Trevor Nelson - Whisper, Shout: Let It Out. BBC Radio 2 DJ Trevor Nelson encourages us to celebrate our voices in this Bedtime Story.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Tightrope. The family are on a nature walk when Tish's dad spots a glass-bottomed bridge that can take them to another viewing point, but Tish is too afraid to cross.
Mural. Children's animation. Bing and Sula really enjoy painting a mural at Amma's nursery, until Bing's enthusiastic rainbow painting makes paint run all over Sula's beautiful tree.
Up Down, Down Up. Preschool series. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po drive the Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they discover the Tubby Uppy Downy and have fun going up and down.
Tee's Bike. Tee wants his bike to go faster so Mo suggests she remove the stabilisers. Tee needs some convincing.
The Chilli Rocket. Chilli pretends he's a superskateboarder, but he can't really skate at all!
Playhouse. Sula, Pando and Bing find a bird's nest in their playhouse.
Hide-and-Seek. Everyone wants to win Swoppiton's hide-and-seek tournament. But Mojo and Bo accidentally break the prize. They need to put it back together without the seeker spotting them!
Campfire Choir. Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!
The Mystery Badge. The Squirrels go to a fancy party at King Tiger's house and become embroiled in a mystery when the prized ruby centrepiece disappears from his party crown.
Ragdoll. Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to buy an ice cream if they can get him into the car.
Octopus. Chloe tries to teach her dad a game she learnt at Bluey's house.
Svalbard Global Seed Vault, Norway. When Ubercorn gets trapped inside an icy mountain, Glitch has to save his old teammate.
The Tale of the High-Flying Badger. Animated series. When a sleepy Tommy Brock is hoisted up into the Squirrel Camp, Peter must work out how to get him back down before he wakes up!
Alpine Swift. The Octonauts assist an alpine swift to catch up with its flock.
Fractions Are a Piece of Cake. At a party on Fraction Island, One joins the Fraction Friends in a song about fractions!
Hide. The adventures of 26 lively letters who make words come to life by holding hands. The Alphablocks play hide-and-seek.
Paint a Picture Day. When Monster Teddy is chosen to pose for everyone's paintings, Love Monster misses him. So Love Monster poses with Monster Teddy so that they can be together.
Socks. It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!
Asparagus. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's young Asparagus, sharing his deep affection for wet weather in the song I Love the Rain.
Show. Children's animation. Bing and his friends put on a show in the park. After Coco's dance, Pando's song and Sula's acrobatics display, everyone is excited to see Bing's finale.
Hedgehog. Dee encourages a friend to say 'hedgehog', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of hedgehogs - a tickly hedgehog, a hungry hedgehog and a hula-hooping hedgehog!
Tower Tower Wow. Declan accidentally upsets Gus by not properly explaining the rules of a game.
Yurticopter. The Piggies turn Fiona's yurt into a Yurticopter so that she can go on an adventure.
More About On and Off. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos learn about on and off by watching a man trying shoes on and taking them off in a shoe shop.
Fairy Tale. Justin and his friends visit a fairy-tale castle, and Mr Tumble has a fairy-tale adventure.
Follow the Leader. Preschool series. The Teletubbies play choo-choo and follow the Tubby Custard Machine on a Tubby Custard Ride.
Sponge. Giovanna and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore sponges through discovery, play, song and story. Babies and grown-ups at home can join in, too!
Play Centre. Elsee joins her friend Mylah for a fun game of I-spy at a play centre.
Tidying Up. James, Noah and Aaron are on a mission to tidy up the city centre garden for a party. They work alongside Chatterpot's friends - a rake, a spade and Wheely the wheelbarrow.
Astronaut. Dylan the astronaut wants to walk on the moon. But when a shooting star gets pulled into a black hole, the expedition turns into a rescue mission.
This Is My Family. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes sing about the importance of family and friends in this heartfelt ballad.
Babies on Board. The gang leads a herd of baby Vegesaurs on a sneak and peek adventure across the valley.
Daddy Putdown. When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine.
The Taste Badge. Duggee is making a smoothie, and the Squirrels can't agree on whether it's yummy or not.
A Few Dinos Too Many! The Game Catchers find themselves on a Beachy Planet and learn to play the game pour and fill. They need to be creative when making more materials for the game!
Boing Boing Timmy. Timmy thinks Otus's jack-in-the-box is brilliant, and he decides to make his own.
Ted Goes to the Beach. Ted and his family head to the beach for a day of fun. Ted tries his hand at making a sandcastle. When it doesn't go quite to plan, Dad's on hand with some top tips.
Febo's American Pumpkin Pie. Febo is baking the traditional American dessert pumpkin pie for his friends.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Honeybees. Chantelle has a special view of a honeycomb while Rory and Sandy search for honeybees.
Mission: Homework. Hearing dog Diesel visits the library to help his owner, Rayane, with his homework.
Spectacled Bear and Tiger. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's the spectacled bear and the tiger.
Waffle and the Birthday Wish. Evie gets a homemade dog house for her birthday, and Mrs Hobbs takes up rollerskating.
Bouncing Back. Oona and Silky try to find a fun game they can play together.
Noisy Neighbours. The builders are so noisy that the gang can't hear themselves play their instruments!   Followed by My Petsaurus.
The Looking After Badge. Animated preschool series. Outside the clubhouse, a large crowd has gathered around a hot-air balloon. It seems someone is going on an adventure!
Boat. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'boat', and there's a whirlwind word adventure, looking at lots of different kinds of boats.
The Rainbow Makers. Join Sixty-three as he discovers his rainbow style, and meets the rest of the Rainbow Sevens as they create their own unique rainbow artwork.
How Now Brown Cow. Educational fun. The Alphablocks meet their match when Brown Cow and her singing friends Owl, Howl and Growl take the stage!
Pairs. Justin meets a pair of twins, and Mr Tumble orders a pair of everything for breakfast!
Things. Preschool series. The Teletubbies find different uses for their favourite things, and a child in Tummy Tales makes a seaside picture out of lots of things.
Patchwork Starfish. Patchwork Starfish has a problem: he loves to dance, but he has hurt his leg! Will the Patchwork Pals find a way to help him?
Raa Raa and the Jingly Jungle Show. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. Raa Raa and his chums put on a Jungle show but with everyone performing on stage, who will watch it?
It's Not Easy Being Clean. Wilson looks shiny and new after his trip to the Chug Wash and the other trainees are impressed - but everyone knows he's a magnet for a mess!
Episode 11. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Flamboyant ballroom dancer Enrico Paso Doble gets distracted by a window that needs cleaning.
Passenger Machines. Series for young children that celebrates lots of different amazing machines. In this episode, motorcycle rider Grace shows off three amazing passenger machines!
The Repeaters. The Game Catchers land on a breathtaking planet to play invisible ball but are interrupted when some funny insects begin repeating all the words they hear.
Yeti Crab. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. A yeti crab damages the ship, endangering itself and the Octonauts.
The Tale of the Hazelnut Raid. Animated series. Peter accidentally destroys the squirrels' store of nuts with one of Mr Bouncer's misfiring inventions.
The Comedy Badge. Animated preschool series. When Tag hurts his knee, the Squirrels decide laughter is the best medicine. But how will they make Tag laugh?
Toby's Blurry Blunders. When Toby has trouble catching a ball, Vida gives him an eye exam and learns he needs glasses.
The Dough Blob. Evil Pea makes a giant dough blob so that she can take over the supermarket. The Tato Team must use some baking know-how to save the day.
Mission Bath. It's bathtime! The Ducklings are determined Weasy will get clean.
Shark 'n' Ride. A shark in Swoppiton? Mojo and Bo go on a fishing trip to find out more!
Ragdoll. Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to buy an ice cream if they can get him into the car.
Duck Cake. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys.
Super Nugget. Nugget reinvents herself as a comic book hero called Super Nugget, but Pancake is dismissive of her new hobby as defender of the berg. The others persuade him to think again.
Andy and the Manatee. Andy heads to the Caribbean in search of some seagrass he needs for a rescued manatee.
Waffle's Playdate. Evie, Waffle, Ruby and Jelly have a playdate. Mrs Hobbs has a delivery disaster.
The Bubble Wish. Rafi's bubble wish fills the park with magical fun.
It's Time for Monty's Haircut. JoJo and Gran Gran meet Ned and Monty, who are on their way to get Monty's hair trimmed. JoJo finds out what goes on at a dog grooming salon.
Twang Ball. Animation for preschool children. Scarf Lady introduces Sarah and Duck to a new game involving knitted sporting equipment.
The Puzzle. Stop-motion animation. Major, Mother, Tiny and Small find a fascinating new planet, but when they start to explore it they get lost inside!
Tickle. MeMo and BaBa have fun playing tickle chase, but BaBa wants to stop playing. With the help of the Yummies, MeMo learns there is a time and place for tickles.
Hiding in Flowerpots. Series for young children. The Pontipines set off for a walk around the garden. Mr and Mrs Pontipine lose the children. Which flowerpot are they hiding in?
Rose Ayling-Ellis - Everybody Can Dance. Rose Ayling-Ellis puts on her dancing shoes and reads a brilliant Bedtime Story celebrating all kinds of people enjoying all kinds of dancing.
